assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertion_results.evidence: Short term: 'Write 3–5 unit tests covering the most critical or most frequently broken API endpoints — not for coverage, for momentum.'

assertion_results.text: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertion_results.evidence: Environments 1/5: 'No staging; local and production only'. Blocker 3: 'No staging environment'. Medium term: 'Provision a staging environment (Heroku pipeline review apps are a low-friction starting point)'.

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD | 2/5 | CI exists but only lints; deploys are fully manual.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertion_results.evidence: 'Write 3–5 unit tests covering the most critical or most frequently broken API endpoints' — unit tests named explicitly as the first test type to adopt.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertion_results.evidence: Short term recommends 3–5 targeted unit tests; framed as 'not for coverage, for momentum'. No full rewrite mentioned anywhere in the plan.
